author: Rosella Nelson
review: Don't rent here unless you want to live in a place that goes neglected.  PTLA took over mgmt of this property in Feb and they are running the place down. It is the middle of June and they have not sent anyone out to maintain the lawn. The

author: Teasa B
review: I still like it here, but rent's going up while service has disappeared entirely... They are a pet friendly residence. There are clean up stations placed all over the complex (that are full all the time). I love seeing peoples fury friends.

author: Jessica
review: Ive really enjoyed living here so far. This is the best apartment complex Ive ever lived in. The property is well maintained. Ra (the property manager) and Jordan (in charge of maintenance) are always very communicative and helpful. If I

author: Erin Mccauley
review: DO NOT RENT!!!!! First off, this company refuses to do any communication by email so they have no paper trail of any of their promises or issues. Red flag. Secondly, they will not tell you that half of the buildings back up to a large

author: Carter Fuehr-Bush
review: The place changed ownership just before we signed our lease in September, and there haven't been any issues so far. Our unit was in great condition, the place is clean, laundry machines work, great location, friendly manager, etc.

author: Jake Widener
review: Some friends just moved here from Utah the place looks really nice but no guest parking and there is always someone else in his reserved parking space

author: ed rod
review: Little hidden community with great neighbors. Management really trying to improve things up.
